skills.description: Use when a developer asks what a Bittensor subnet does, whether it's up right now, or how to call/integrate its API — e.g. "which subnet does image generation", "is subnet 7 healthy", "how do I call the Chutes API", "build on a Bittensor subnet". Backed by metagraphed (api.metagraph.sh), the live operational + integration registry for ~129 subnets.
skills.name: bittensor
